text: Amazon demonstrated solid revenue growth in Q2 2025, with total revenue reaching $167.7 billion, representing a 7.73% year-over-year increase according to the growth analysis. This marks an acceleration from Q1 2025 revenue of $155.7 billion, suggesting improving demand trends across the company's diversified business segments. The sequential quarter-over-quarter revenue growth of approximately 7.7% indicates healthy momentum heading into the second half of 2025.
